instruction: <RETAIL>You are James Sanchez. You live in Chicago 60623. You want to exchange the camera for the highest resolution, waterproof camera that you can get with the previous purchaced price.

hints.segment: for the highest resolution, waterproof camera
hints.hint: Exchange it for the highest resolution, waterproof camera that's available

hints.segment: that you can get with the previous purchaced price
hints.hint: Limit to models available at my previous purchase price
